<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Exception; /** * The HTTP request contains headers with conflicting information. * * @author Magnus Nordlander <magnus@fervo.se> */ class ConflictingHeadersException extends UnexpectedValueException implements RequestExceptionInterface { }
